facts.text: /*Core stylesheets*/ /* comment out on 6/14/2022 @import url("//assets.nlm.nih.gov/assets/3.4.1/bootstrap/3.3.1/css/bootstrap.min.css"); @import url("//assets.nlm.nih.gov/assets/3.4.1/font-awesome/font-awesome.css"); @import url("//assets.nlm.nih.gov/assets/3.4.1/globalassets/styles/adobeBlank/adobe-blank.css"); @import url("//assets.nlm.nih.gov/jquery-ui/jquery-ui-1.13.1/jquery-ui.css"); /*External library stylesheets*/ /*@import url("../vendor/chart/1.0.1/css/charts.css");*/ @import url("//assets.nlm.nih.gov/assets/3.4.1/datatables/1.9.1/css/datatables.css"); @import url("//assets.nlm.nih.gov/assets/3.4.1/datepicker/v6/css/datepicker.css"); /* @import url("http://assets.nukulele.org/3.4.1/jquery.customInput/css/enhanced.css"); */ /*@import url("http://assets.nukulele.org/3.4.1/jquery.collapsible/1.0/css/collapsible.css");*/ @import url("//assets.nlm.nih.gov/assets/3.4.1/rwdTable/1.0/css/rwdtable-core.css"); /*@import url("http://assets.nukulele.org/3.4.1/share/4.0/styles/sharewidget-4.0.css");*/ /* Global Assets stylesheets */ @import url("//assets.nlm.nih.gov/assets/3.4.1/globalassets/styles/widgets/alerts.css"); @import url("//assets.nlm.nih.gov/assets/3.4.1/globalassets/styles/widgets/buttons.css"); @import url("//assets.nlm.nih.gov/assets/3.4.1/globalassets/styles/widgets/tooltips.css"); @import url("//assets.nlm.nih.gov/assets/3.4.1/globalassets/styles/widgets/carousel.css"); @import url("//assets.nlm.nih.gov/assets/3.4.1/globalassets/styles/widgets/modalstyles.css"); input { margin: 0; padding: 1px 2px; } input, button, select, optgroup, textarea { margin: 0; font-family: inherit; font-size: inherit; line-height: inherit; } /*header {*/ /* background-color: #008;*/ /* padding: 1em;*/ /* margin-bottom: 1em;*/ /* border-bottom-left-radius: 1em;*/ /* border-bottom-right-radius: 1em;*/ /*}*/ /*main {*/ /* background-color: white;*/ /* padding: 1em;*/ /*}*/ /*#body a {*/ /* color: #254062;*/ /* text-decoration: underline;*/ /*}*/ /*footer {*/ /* background-color: #bbe;*/ /* margin-top: 1em;*/ /* padding: 1em;*/ /* border-top-left-radius: 1em;*/ /* border-top-right-radius: 1em;*/ /*}*/ /*.error {*/ /* color: FireBrick;*/ /*}*/ /*.bg-primary { background-color: #326295 !important;}*/ /*body { font-size: medium;}*/
